stacks.name: python-fastapi-uv-ruff-orjson-polars
stacks.guidance: Treat FastAPI routes plus Python smoke tests as the primary service surface.

stacks.name: typescript-hono-bun
stacks.guidance: Prefer the Hono workflow and keep TSX route fragments explicit.

stacks.name: nim-jester-happyx
stacks.guidance: Prefer Jester routes for transport and HappyX only where HTML fragments are an explicit contract surface.

stacks.name: crystal-kemal-avram
stacks.guidance: Use Kemal for explicit routing and keep Avram model or query boundaries visible where data access matters.

stacks.name: scala-tapir-http4s-zio
stacks.guidance: Use Tapir for typed contracts, keep http4s route wiring explicit, and let ZIO define effect boundaries.

stacks.name: kotlin-http4k-exposed
stacks.guidance: Use http4k for explicit route composition and let Exposed define small query and transaction helpers.

stacks.name: clojure-kit-nextjdbc-hiccup
stacks.guidance: Use Kit-style Integrant wiring, keep Reitit routes explicit, and let next.jdbc plus Hiccup define data and fragment boundaries.

stacks.name: ocaml-dream-caqti-tyxml
stacks.guidance: Use Dream for explicit route composition, keep Caqti requests named, and let TyXML define HTML fragment boundaries.

stacks.name: zig-zap-jetzig
stacks.guidance: Use Zap for transport and Jetzig view patterns when HTML fragments are part of the response contract.

stacks.name: rust-axum-modern
stacks.guidance: Use Axum route guidance and keep smoke versus integration concerns separate.

stacks.name: go-echo
stacks.guidance: Treat Echo handlers plus templ-facing surfaces as the active implementation path.

stacks.name: elixir-phoenix
stacks.guidance: Router and controller files are the strongest Phoenix implementation signals.

stacks.name: duckdb-trino-polars
stacks.guidance: Prefer data-pipeline doctrine and deterministic fixture guidance.

stacks.name: qdrant
stacks.guidance: Local RAG signals should load indexing, retrieval, and metadata guidance.

stacks.name: redis-keydb-mongo
stacks.guidance: Multi-storage repos need isolation and real boundary tests before adding more context.

stacks.name: prompt-first-repo
stacks.guidance: Prompt-first repos should favor routing, prompt numbering, and profile validation guidance.

archetypes.name: backend-api-service
archetypes.guidance: HTTP entrypoints and handler/controller files dominate the active repo shape.

archetypes.name: cli-tool
archetypes.guidance: Operator-facing command surfaces usually imply the CLI archetype.

archetypes.name: data-pipeline
archetypes.guidance: Favor deterministic transforms, fixtures, and repeatable pipeline checks.

archetypes.name: local-rag-system
archetypes.guidance: Corpora, index configuration, and vector round trips indicate a local RAG repo.

archetypes.name: multi-storage-experiment
archetypes.guidance: Favor explicit comparison of storage behaviors over hidden abstraction.

archetypes.name: prompt-first-repo
archetypes.guidance: Prompt files and generated profiles make prompt-first the leading archetype.

archetypes.name: dokku-deployable-service
archetypes.guidance: Dokku artifacts indicate a deployable single-service posture.

workflows.name: add-api-endpoint
workflows.guidance: Routes, handlers, and controllers imply the API endpoint workflow.

workflows.name: add-smoke-tests
workflows.guidance: Prefer the smallest meaningful happy-path check before expanding test scope.

workflows.name: add-storage-integration
workflows.guidance: Real boundary changes should load storage integration doctrine and examples.

workflows.name: add-deployment-support
workflows.guidance: Deployment artifacts should pull in Dokku philosophy and readiness checklists.

workflows.name: generate-prompt-sequence
workflows.guidance: Prompt files should keep numbering monotonic and the prompt index current.

workflows.name: add-local-rag-indexing
workflows.guidance: Load local RAG workflow guidance when indexing or retrieval signals appear.

workflows.name: post-flight-refinement
workflows.guidance: Meta-structure edits often imply post-flight refinement.

extension_paths.name: zig-zap-jetzig
extension_paths.guidance: Favor minimal stack docs extending routing, smoke-test, and Compose isolation conventions.

extension_paths.name: clojure-kit-next-jdbc-hiccup
extension_paths.guidance: Keep extension work focused on repo signals, smoke tests, and deployment isolation.

extension_paths.name: kotlin-http4k-exposed
extension_paths.guidance: Favor backend-api routing, storage boundaries, and prompt-first manifests.

extension_paths.name: dart-dart-frog
extension_paths.guidance: Treat Dart Frog as an archetype-plus-stack extension, not a special-case architecture.
